sub_modules.bpf_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM that returns the fixed 101-tap signed FIR coefficient for a tap address.
sub_modules.bpf_tap_product: Combinational signed multiplier for one delayed sample and one FIR coefficient.
sub_modules.bpf_mac_sum: Combinational accumulator that sums all tap products into a 64-bit fixed-point result.
